message:
style(lexical_generation): derive Default on LexicalGenerationMergeDebtState

Replace the hand-rolled `impl Default` with a `#[derive(Default)]` +
`#[default]` on the `None` variant. Functionally identical, clears the
last `clippy::derivable_impls` warning in the workspace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
